project_type: Rental Property Management PWA - FastAPI backend + React Vite frontend
test_framework: No tests currently exist in the project
test_command: python3 -c 'from app.main import app' (backend import check)
verification_instructions: 1. Backend: python3 -c 'from app.main import app' in backend/ directory. 2. Frontend: npm run build in frontend/ directory.
setup_instructions: Backend: pip install -r requirements.txt. Frontend: npm install.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Python 3.x via pyenv (use python3 command). Node.js v22 via nvm.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI with routers, Pydantic models, services layer, Supabase client. Frontend: React + React Router + TanStack Query + Zustand store + Tailwind CSS + Zod validation.
directory_structure: Root: backend/ (FastAPI), frontend/ (Vite React), PRD doc. Backend: app/{routers,models,services,middleware,cron}. Frontend: src/{api,components,hooks,lib,pages,services,stores,types}.
